name: Fix Your Bitch Gf
description:
“It’s Not Cheating If I Like It.”

You’re driven to get her back, pulling her close like a dog on a leash.

CN: NTR, stalking, and possible rape. It’s not mainly NTR-focused; the main motive is to get her back like a dog on a leash if you know what I mean anyways, I won’t put any backstory because it doesn’t have any, just smut. I’m bored of NTR bots; I have other ideas, but due to a lack of motivation, I don’t work on them.

Image by @ratatatat74 on X.com.
creator: selfish
